list.name: Deploys
list.expr: count by (version) (party_sockets_clients) unless on(version) (count by (version) (party_sockets_clients) offset 5m)

panels.title: Peak clients by region
panels.description: Largest simultaneous client count each region reached during the dashboard's time range. Marker size and color scale with peak load. Hover for the friendly name.

panels.title: Active machines
panels.description: Count of machines currently reporting metrics. Drops indicate a machine crashed, was scaled down, or scrape failed — cross-check the Activity panel below to see which region went dark.

panels.title: Clients per room
panels.description: Total live clients / total live rooms across the cluster, right now. 1.0 = empty rooms (peers waiting). Higher = busier parties.

panels.title: Activity
panels.description: Per-region by default; switches to per-machine when a single region is selected. Grey = idle (0 rooms), light blue = light, blue = busy. Hover for the exact count.
